name: homewise
description: Turn a property's listing paperwork into buyer due-diligence documents. Point it at a folder, drop in a loose pile of PDFs, or add files one home at a time - it sorts and reads them by content (no fixed layout or naming required). /homewise:evaluate turns one property into a printable, disclosure-driven inspection checklist; /homewise:compare turns several into a color-coded disclosure comparison sheet plus a combined booklet. HTML first; PDF on request.
